description: Genuinely benign refactor: renamed variables, an extracted helper function, and a Tailwind-class tweak, touching no auth/payments/db/crypto-shaped path (§15.2 row 10). The false-positive sentinel — any rule firing here is a bug in the fixture or the rule, not something to paper over. astNewFileContent is included so crypto/weak-hash's AST matcher is exercised for real, not just skipped because no AST project was built.
